evals.prompt: I need a new page at /dashboard/schedule that displays the weekly schedule. It should use the DashboardLayout template and render a ScheduleGrid organism. Make it a server component.
evals.expected_output: A page.tsx in frontend/src/app/dashboard/schedule/ that imports DashboardLayout from templates and ScheduleGrid from organisms.
expectations: Does not include 'use client' directive (server component)
Exports metadata with title and description

evals.prompt: Create a login page at /login using the AuthLayout template. It should be a client component because it needs useState for form handling.
evals.expected_output: A page.tsx in frontend/src/app/(auth)/login/ with 'use client' directive, using AuthLayout template.
expectations: Creates page.tsx inside an (auth) route group
Includes 'use client' directive at the top
Uses useState or a form handling hook

evals.prompt: I want to add a loading skeleton and error boundary for the tasks page at /dashboard/tasks.
evals.expected_output: loading.tsx and error.tsx files in frontend/src/app/dashboard/tasks/ following Next.js conventions.
expectations: Creates loading.tsx in the tasks route directory
error.tsx accepts error and reset props
